Relay operators grouped by contact info - shows network diversity and operator influence across the Tor network.

  • Contacts: 3125 unique relay operators with contact information
  • Network Relays: Total: 10193
    • Primary Role: Guard: 4201 | Middle: 2985 | Exit: 3007
    • Role Categories: Guard: 4201 | Middle: 2985 | Exit: 1012 | Guard+Exit: 1995
    • All Roles: Guard: 6196 | Middle: 2985 | Exit: 3007
    • Bandwidth Measured: 10001 relays, 98.1% of all relays
  • Operator Concentration: 12.5% controlled by largest operator | 46.7% controlled by top 10 operators | 13.9% have no contact info
  • Capacity Distribution: Gini coefficient 0.610 (POOR inequality) | guard capacity (72.7%) | ADEQUATE exit capacity (37.6%)
  • Sorted by: unique as count
  • Key: BW = Observed Bandwidth Capacity, BW Mean = Average Observed Bandwidth Capacity, CW = Consensus Weight, AS = Autonomous System (network provider)
